text.message: tell me what resource you cherish most and give me the pleasure of taking it away
man blue and red got cities
you killed my game so i kill yours
you killed my game then still block the 8 over blue and steal from me
haha and you embargoed me too, seems like you took it personally
I'm dead last, you are in good position, can you reconsider
victory doesnt bother me, its suffering that entertains me
I guess, I didn't even make a crazy aggressive play or anything
catan is a social game, a channel for human emotions. learn from this defeat. do not kill your enemies before they are even born
